# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it. Use framework-provided safe rendering by default.
# Category: xss

<?php
// app/Helpers/HtmlSanitizer.php

namespace App\Helpers;

class HtmlSanitizer
{
    /**
     * Allowed HTML tags and their allowed attributes
     */
    private static array $allowedTags = [
        'b' => [],
        'strong' => [],
        'i' => [],
        'em' => [],
        'u' => [],
        'a' => ['href', 'title', 'rel'],
        'p' => [],
        'br' => [],
        'ul' => [],
        'ol' => [],
        'li' => [],
        'blockquote' => [],
        'code' => [],
        'pre' => [],
    ];

    /**
     * Sanitize HTML content, allowing only safe tags and attributes
     */
    public static function sanitize(?string $html): string
    {
        if (empty($html)) {
            return '';
        }

        // First, strip all tags except allowed ones
        $allowedTagString = implode('', array_map(fn($tag) => "<{$tag}>", array_keys(self::$allowedTags)));
        $html = strip_tags($html, $allowedTagString);

        // Parse and sanitize attributes using DOMDocument
        $html = self::sanitizeAttributes($html);

        return $html;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize attributes on allowed tags, removing dangerous attributes and protocols
     */
    private static function sanitizeAttributes(string $html): string
    {
        if (empty(trim($html))) {
            return $html;
        }

        $dom = new \DOMDocument('1.0', 'UTF-8');

        // Suppress warnings for potentially malformed HTML fragments
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        $dom->loadHTML(
            '<?xml encoding="UTF-8"><div>' . $html . '</div>',
            LIBXML_HTML_NOIMPLIED | LIBXML_HTML_NODEFDTD
        );
        libxml_clear_errors();

        self::sanitizeNode($dom->documentElement);

        $output = '';
        $wrapper = $dom->getElementsByTagName('div')->item(0);
        if ($wrapper) {
            foreach ($wrapper->childNodes as $child) {
                $output .= $dom->saveHTML($child);
            }
        }

        return $output;
    }

    /**
     * Recursively sanitize DOM nodes
     */
    private static function sanitizeNode(\DOMNode $node): void
    {
        if ($node->nodeType === XML_ELEMENT_NODE) {
            /** @var \DOMElement $node */
            $tagName = strtolower($node->tagName);

            if (isset(self::$allowedTags[$tagName])) {
                $allowedAttrs = self::$allowedTags[$tagName];

                // Remove disallowed attributes
                $attrsToRemove = [];
                foreach ($node->attributes as $attr) {
                    if (!in_array(strtolower($attr->name), $allowedAttrs)) {
                        $attrsToRemove[] = $attr->name;
                    }
                }
                foreach ($attrsToRemove as $attrName) {
                    $node->removeAttribute($attrName);
                }

                // Sanitize href attributes to prevent javascript: protocol
                if ($node->hasAttribute('href')) {
                    $href = trim($node->getAttribute('href'));
                    if (!self::isSafeUrl($href)) {
                        $node->setAttribute('href', '#');
                    }
                    // Force rel="nofollow noopener" on links
                    $node->setAttribute('rel', 'nofollow noopener');
                }
            }
        }

        // Recursively sanitize child nodes
        if ($node->hasChildNodes()) {
            foreach ($node->childNodes as $child) {
                self::sanitizeNode($child);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Check if a URL is safe (no javascript:, data:, vbscript: etc.)
     */
    private static function isSafeUrl(string $url): bool
    {
        $url = strtolower(trim($url));

        // Remove null bytes and whitespace tricks
        $url = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1f\x7f]/', '', $url);

        $dangerousProtocols = ['javascript:', 'vbscript:', 'data:', 'file:'];

        foreach ($dangerousProtocols as $protocol) {
            if (str_starts_with($url, $protocol)) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }
}

<?php
// app/Providers/BladeServiceProvider.php (or add to AppServiceProvider)

namespace App\Providers;

use App\Helpers\HtmlSanitizer;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Blade;
use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;

class BladeServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
{
    public function register(): void
    {
        //
    }

    public function boot(): void
    {
        // Register a custom Blade directive for sanitized HTML output
        Blade::directive('sanitize', function ($expression) {
            return "<?php echo \App\Helpers\HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($expression); ?>";
        });
    }
}

<?php
// resources/views/blog/comments.blade.php
?>

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')
<div class="blog-post-comments">
    <h2>Comments ({{ $comments->count() }})</h2>

    @forelse($comments as $comment)
        <div class="comment" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
            <div class="comment-header">
                <span class="comment-author">{{ $comment->user->name }}</span>
                <time class="comment-date" datetime="{{ $comment->created_at->toIso8601String() }}">
                    {{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                </time>
            </div>

            <div class="comment-body">
                {{-- 
                    SECURITY: We use the @sanitize directive instead of {!! !!}
                    to prevent XSS attacks. The sanitizer only allows safe HTML tags
                    (b, strong, i, em, u, a, p, br, ul, ol, li, blockquote, code, pre)
                    and strips dangerous attributes and protocols (javascript:, etc.).
                    
                    NEVER use {!! $comment->content !!} with untrusted user input.
                --}}
                @sanitize($comment->content)
            </div>

            <div class="comment-actions">
                @auth
                    @if(auth()->id() === $comment->user_id)
                        <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $comment) }}">Edit</a>
                        <form method="POST" action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment) }}" class="inline-form">
                            @csrf
                            @method('DELETE')
                            <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Delete this comment?')">Delete</button>
                        </form>
                    @endif
                    <button class="reply-btn" data-comment-id="{{ $comment->id }}">Reply</button>
                @endauth
            </div>

            {{-- Nested replies --}}
            @if($comment->replies && $comment->replies->count() > 0)
                <div class="comment-replies">
                    @foreach($comment->replies as $reply)
                        <div class="comment reply" id="comment-{{ $reply->id }}">
                            <div class="comment-header">
                                <span class="comment-author">{{ $reply->user->name }}</span>
                                <time class="comment-date" datetime="{{ $reply->created_at->toIso8601String() }}">
                                    {{ $reply->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                </time>
                            </div>
                            <div class="comment-body">
                                @sanitize($reply->content)
                            </div>
                            <div class="comment-actions">
                                @auth
                                    @if(auth()->id() === $reply->user_id)
                                        <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $reply) }}">Edit</a>
                                        <form method="POST" action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $reply) }}" class="inline-form">
                                            @csrf
                                            @method('DELETE')
                                            <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Delete this comment?')">Delete</button>
                                        </form>
                                    @endif
                                @endauth
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    @endforeach
                </div>
            @endif
        </div>
    @empty
        <p class="no-comments">No comments yet. Be the first to share your thoughts!</p>
    @endforelse

    {{-- Pagination --}}
    @if($comments instanceof \Illuminate\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator)
        <div class="comments-pagination">
            {{ $comments->links() }}
        </div>
    @endif

    {{-- New Comment Form --}}
    @auth
        <div class="comment-form-wrapper">
            <h3>Leave a Comment</h3>

            @if($errors->any())
                <div class="alert alert-danger">
                    <ul>
                        @foreach($errors->all() as $error)
                            <li>{{ $error }}</li>
                        @endforeach
                    </ul>
                </div>
            @endif

            <form method="POST" action="{{ route('comments.store', $post) }}" id="comment-form">
                @csrf
                <input type="hidden" name="parent_id" id="parent_id" value="">

                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="content">Your Comment</label>
                    <p class="form-help">
                        You may use basic HTML: 
                        <code>&lt;b&gt;</code>, <code>&lt;i&gt;</code>, <code>&lt;a href="..."&gt;</code>, 
                        <code>&lt;ul&gt;</code>, <code>&lt;ol&gt;</code>, <code>&lt;blockquote&gt;</code>, 
                        <code>&lt;code&gt;</code>
                    </p>
                    <textarea 
                        name="content" 
                        id="content" 
                        rows="5" 
                        class="form-control @error('content') is-invalid @enderror"
                        required
                        maxlength="10000"
                    >{{ old('content') }}</textarea>
                    @error('content')
                        <div class="invalid-feedback">{{ $message }}</div>
                    @enderror
                </div>

                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Post Comment</button>
            </form>
        </div>
    @else
        <p class="login-prompt">
            <a href="{{ route('login') }}">Log in</a> to leave a comment.
        </p>
    @endauth
</div>
@endsection

<?php
// app/Http/Controllers/CommentController.php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use App\Helpers\HtmlSanitizer;
use App\Models\Comment;
use App\Models\Post;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class CommentController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->middleware('auth')->except(['index']);
    }

    /**
     * Display comments for a blog post
     */
    public function index(Post $post)
    {
        $comments = $post->comments()
            ->whereNull('parent_id')
            ->with(['user', 'replies.user'])
            ->orderByDesc('created_at')
            ->paginate(20);

        return view('blog.comments', compact('post', 'comments'));
    }

    /**
     * Store a new comment
     */
    public function store(Request $request, Post $post)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'content' => ['required', 'string', 'max:10000'],
            'parent_id' => ['nullable', 'exists:comments,id'],
        ]);

        // Sanitize the HTML content before storing
        $sanitizedContent = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($validated['content']);

        if (empty(trim(strip_tags($sanitizedContent)))) {
            return back()->withErrors(['content' => 'Comment cannot be empty after sanitization.']);
        }

        $comment = new Comment();
        $comment->content = $sanitizedContent;
        $comment->user_id = auth()->id();
        $comment->post_id = $post->id;
        $comment->parent_id = $validated['parent_id'] ?? null;
        $comment->save();

        return redirect()
            ->route('comments.index', $post)
            ->with('success', 'Comment posted successfully!')
            ->withFragment('comment-' . $comment->id);
    }

    /**
     * Update an existing comment
     */
    public function update(Request $request, Comment $comment)
    {
        $this->authorize('update', $comment);

        $validated = $request->validate([
            'content' => ['required', 'string', 'max:10000'],
        ]);

        // Sanitize the HTML content before storing
        $sanitizedContent = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($validated['content']);

        if (empty(trim(strip_tags($sanitizedContent)))) {
            return back()->withErrors(['content' => 'Comment cannot be empty after sanitization.']);
        }

        $comment->content = $sanitizedContent;
        $comment->save();

        return redirect()
            ->route('comments.index', $comment->post)
            ->with('success', 'Comment updated successfully!');
    }

    /**
     * Delete a comment
     */
    public function destroy(Comment $comment)
    {
        $this->authorize('delete', $comment);

        $post = $comment->post;
        $comment->delete();

        return redirect()
            ->route('comments.index', $post)
            ->with('success', 'Comment deleted successfully!');
    }
}

<?php
// app/Models/Comment.php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;

class Comment extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'content',
        'user_id',
        'post_id',
        'parent_id',
    ];

    public function user(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(User::class);
    }

    public function post(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Post::class);
    }

    public function parent(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Comment::class, 'parent_id');
    }

    public function replies(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Comment::class, 'parent_id')->orderBy('created_at');
    }
}

<?php
// tests/Unit/HtmlSanitizerTest.php

namespace Tests\Unit;

use App\Helpers\HtmlSanitizer;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

class HtmlSanitizerTest extends TestCase
{
    public function test_allows_safe_html_tags(): void
    {
        $input = '<b>bold</b> and <i>italic</i> and <em>emphasis</em>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringContainsString('<b>bold</b>', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('<i>italic</i>', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('<em>emphasis</em>', $result);
    }

    public function test_strips_script_tags(): void
    {
        $input = '<script>alert("XSS")</script><b>safe</b>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('<script>', $result);
        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('alert', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('<b>safe</b>', $result);
    }

    public function test_strips_event_handler_attributes(): void
    {
        $input = '<b onmouseover="alert(1)">text</b>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('onmouseover', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('<b>text</b>', $result);
    }

    public function test_sanitizes_javascript_protocol_in_links(): void
    {
        $input = '<a href="javascript:alert(1)">click me</a>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('javascript:', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('href="#"', $result);
    }

    public function test_allows_safe_links(): void
    {
        $input = '<a href="https://example.com" title="Example">link</a>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringContainsString('href="https://example.com"', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('title="Example"', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('rel="nofollow noopener"', $result);
    }

    public function test_strips_img_tags(): void
    {
        $input = '<img src="x" onerror="alert(1)">text';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('<img', $result);
        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('onerror', $result);
    }

    public function test_strips_iframe_tags(): void
    {
        $input = '<iframe src="https://evil.com"></iframe>text';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('<iframe', $result);
    }

    public function test_handles_null_input(): void
    {
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize(null);
        $this->assertEquals('', $result);
    }

    public function test_handles_empty_string(): void
    {
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize('');
        $this->assertEquals('', $result);
    }

    public function test_strips_data_protocol_in_links(): void
    {
        $input = '<a href="data:text/html,<script>alert(1)</script>">click</a>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('data:', $result);
        $this->assertStringContainsString('href="#"', $result);
    }

    public function test_strips_style_attribute(): void
    {
        $input = '<b style="background:url(javascript:alert(1))">text</b>';
        $result = HtmlSanitizer::sanitize($input);

        $this->assertStringNotContainsString('style', $result);
    }
}
